from cadquery import Workplane

# Create ring band using a torus
# Major radius: 10mm (ring size), Minor radius: 2mm (band thickness)
ring_band = (Workplane("XY")
    .moveTo(0, 0)
    .circle(10)  # Major radius
    .circle(2)   # Minor radius for cross-section
    .sweep(360, (0, 0, 0), (0, 0, 1))  # Sweep to create torus
)

# Create the prong setting base
setting_base = (Workplane("XY")
    .transformed(offset=(0, 0, 2))  # Position on top of band
    .cylinder(3, 6, centered=(True, True, Fal...
